title: Iron Chests (Plugin)
body:
![Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3406df4dd9be4104a5440a266b3e6eea9ad91d3.png)

Textures are editable in the configuration, default textures by [Minecraft Heads](https://minecraft-heads.com/)

Download, place in your server's plugin folder and have fun!
